mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, description, is_visible, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM site_tag WHERE is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, code, name, description, is_visible, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM site_tag WHERE is_deleted = FALSE AND is_visible = TRUE ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, code, name, description, is_visible, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM site_tag WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT id, code, name, description, is_visible, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM site_tag WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_tag ( code, name, description, is_visible, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{isVisible}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_tag SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, is_visible = #{isVisible} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_tag SET is_deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
